SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffRelocationTable

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffRelocationTable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, Collection<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, List<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, SequencedCollection<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, IndirectList<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, StreamWritable, Writable
public class CoffRelocationTable extends Object implements IndirectList<CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel>, Writable
COFF relocation table containing relocation entries for a section. Relocations specify how to adjust addresses when linking.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CoffRelocationTable.CoffRel
    A single COFF relocation entry.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffRelocationTable

      public CoffRelocationTable(CoffFile coff, CoffSection section)
      Creates a new empty COFF relocation table for a section.
      Parameters:
      coff - the parent COFF file
      section - the section this relocation table belongs to

    • CoffRelocationTable

      public CoffRelocationTable(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser, CoffSection section, int pointerToRelocations, int numberOfRelocations) throws IOException
      Parses a COFF relocation table from a parser.
      Parameters:
      coff - the parent COFF file
      parser - the parser containing the input stream
      section - the section this relocation table belongs to
      pointerToRelocations - file offset to the relocations
      numberOfRelocations - number of relocation entries
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during parsing

  • Method Details

    • add

      public void add(int virtualAddress, CoffSymbolTable.CoffSymbol symbol, CoffRelocationType type)
      Adds a relocation entry referencing a symbol.
      Parameters:
      virtualAddress - the virtual address where the relocation applies
      symbol - the symbol to reference
      type - the relocation type

    • add

      public void add(int virtualAddress, int symbolTableIndex, CoffRelocationType type)
      Adds a relocation entry by symbol table index.
      Parameters:
      virtualAddress - the virtual address where the relocation applies
      symbolTableIndex - the index into the symbol table
      type - the relocation type
